deploymentTarget.description: Deployment provider. kubernetes and yarn application mode are implemented.

flinkVersion.description: Optional Flink version used to choose provider compatibility behavior, for example 1.19.1.

yarnQueue.description: YARN queue for application mode submission.

yarnProvidedLibDirs.description: Comma-separated YARN provided library directories, usually HDFS paths.

flinkDistJar.description: Flink distribution jar path visible to the YARN submission runtime.

hadoopUser.description: Optional Hadoop proxy user for YARN operations.

applicationType.description: Optional YARN application type. Defaults to Apache Flink.

applicationTags.description: Optional YARN application tags. Defaults to flink-intelligent-ops.

jobManagerUrl.description: Optional read-back verification URL after start.

jobId.description: Optional job ID for read-back verification after start.

httpHostHeader.description: Optional HTTP Host header for read-back verification through NodePort or ingress.

verify.description: Read back JobManager REST after submission and report whether the target appears healthy.

expectedTargetLock.description: Optional target fingerprint from a prior dry-run. Mismatch fails with TargetLockMismatch.
